codeReview.summary: The worker fixed the wrong test. The assigned feature was to fix test_five_layer_precedence_ordering in crates/swell-core/src/config.rs (which panics at line 552 with 'called Option::unwrap() on a None value'), but the worker only fixed cross_config_cascade.rs in swell-orchestrator. The test in config.rs still fails when running with --test-threads=4 in the full workspace.

issues.description: test_five_layer_precedence_ordering does not have proper env var cleanup at the start of the test. Unlike test_higher_layer_overrides_lower_layer which calls std::env::remove_var("SWELL_TIMEOUT") at the start, this test only removes the env var at the end. This causes test isolation failures when running in parallel with --test-threads=4.
This file was modified by the worker, but this is NOT the file that was assigned. The feature description clearly states the issue is in 'crates/swell-core/src/config.rs panics on Option::unwrap()'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker misinterpreted the scope of the feature. The feature description clearly states 'Fix the pre-existing workspace test failure: test_five_layer_precedence_ordering in crates/swell-core/src/config.rs panics on Option::unwrap()'. The worker instead fixed cross_config_cascade.rs which was not mentioned in the feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature description: 'Fix the pre-existing workspace test failure: test_five_layer_precedence_ordering in crates/swell-core/src/config.rs panics on Option::unwrap()'. Commit 43d7d99 only modified crates/swell-orchestrator/tests/cross_config_cascade.rs

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill was used but the worker did not follow the feature description accurately. The skillFeedback from the handoff doesn't indicate any deviation from procedure, but the output does not match the assigned task.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker session d28622bc ended with success state, but the handoff shows 'Fixed race condition in cross_config_cascade tests' - this is the wrong file entirely.

summary: FAIL: Worker fixed the wrong test file. The assigned feature was to fix test_five_layer_precedence_ordering in swell-core/src/config.rs, but the worker only modified swell-orchestrator/tests/cross_config_cascade.rs. The test in config.rs still fails with 'called Option::unwrap() on a None value' when running the full workspace with --test-threads=4. The test passes in isolation (--test-threads=1) but fails in parallel, indicating a test isolation issue that was not addressed.
